## Summary

- what changed
- why the change is needed

## Validation

- [ ] `pytest`
- [ ] `ruff check .`
- [ ] `ruff format --check .`
- [ ] manual validation documented below when needed

## Risk and safety review

- [ ] no destructive behavior introduced
- [ ] destructive or data-changing behavior is not part of this PR
- [ ] if data-changing behavior is involved, it is report-only, dry-run, or quarantine-first
- [ ] operational risks and limits are documented

## Documentation

- [ ] README updated if user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] CONTRIBUTING updated if workflow expectations changed
- [ ] docs updated if architecture, configuration, or scope changed

## Notes for reviewers

- related issues:
- out of scope:
- manual test notes:
